title: Error sending message via WhatsApp node
symptom: The WhatsApp node fails to send messages and returns an error. This issue persists even after downgrading n8n versions.
not_this_if: Message sends successfully in other workflows
root_cause: The error occurs because the node is incorrectly configured to use 'textMessage.text' instead of the required 'text' parameter. Additionally, the recipient's phone number may lack the necessary country code, which is essential for successful message delivery.
fix_steps: Change the parameter from 'textMessage.text' to 'text' in the WhatsApp node settings
Ensure the phone number includes the correct country code (e.g., 55 for Brazil)
agent_instruction: Update the WhatsApp node to use 'text' and verify the phone number format.
